label: No-worktree Conductor workspace
description: A request that asks Trycycle to reuse an already-isolated Conductor workspace instead of creating a nested git worktree.

INITIAL_REQUEST_AND_SUBSEQUENT_CONVERSAT.text: Use trycycle --no-worktree to add a keyboard shortcut overlay to the desktop app.

USER_REQUEST_TRANSCRIPT.text: Use trycycle --no-worktree to add a keyboard shortcut overlay to the desktop app.

FULL_CONVERSATION_VERBATIM.text: Use trycycle --no-worktree to add a keyboard shortcut overlay to the desktop app.
